core_mechanism: Evaluation of a semiclassical (WKB-type) action integral as a period/contour integral of a momentum function around the branch points of an associated algebraic (spectral) curve, resummed in closed form via hypergeometric-type special functions
brief_reason: The abstract computes a radial action along geodesics with exact resummation into hypergeometric/Fox-Wright functions and identifies it with the quantum a-cycle (period integral) of a Seiberg-Witten-type curve derived from the radial equation, which is exactly the WKB action/period-integral-over-a-spectral-curve machinery.
